summary: Comprehensive industry research on AI agent memory systems. Studied: Letta/MemGPT, Mem0, Zep/Graphiti, Hindsight, LangMem, CrewAI, AutoGen, ChatGPT, A-Mem, SuperMemory, Mastra, MemOS. (2) Letta sleep-time compute enables async memory consolidation without live latency impact. (3) Zep bitemporal modeling (valid_at/invalid_at) enables fact invalidation and temporal audit. (4) Mem0 update-not-append pipeline prevents noise accumulation. (5) Context rot proven by Chroma 2025: every token added degrades attention — memory bridge must be token-budgeted. CLEO recommendations: add typed memory schema, temporal validity, dedup gate at write time, sleep-time consolidator, dual-strategy retrieval, token budget enforcement on memory bridge.

title: T726 Transcript Lifecycle Council — Lead A Audit
summary: Full audit of ~/.claude/projects/ transcript storage. Key findings: (1) P0 bug — getTranscript() reads UUID subdirs for *.jsonl but root-level session JSONLs are siblings; extraction pipeline has never received a transcript since T144 shipped; (2) 3.5GB across 44 projects, 750MB for cleocode alone, zero GC; (3) 86 root session JSONLs + 964 subagent JSONLs in cleocode; (4) .temp/ is 100% symlinks to .claude/projects/ — ignore for GC; (5) No cron/systemd timer for prune; (6) LLM extraction + reflector + consolidation pipeline is fully built but starved of input due to P0 bug. Three-tier lifecycle designed: Hot (0-24h full JSONL), Warm (1-7d pending extraction), Cold (>7d brain.db only). Hard caps: 100MB/session triggers early extraction, 5GB total triggers emergency prune, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY absent falls back to 30d raw delete. 7 atomic child tasks created: T728 (CLI scan/extract/prune), T729 (P0 bug fix), T730 (warm-to-cold extraction service), T731 (systemd timer + budget cap), T732 (session.end hook), T733 (migration of existing sessions), T735 (ADR + tests). title: Cross-Platform Autonomous Transcript Garbage Collection — T751
summary: Comprehensive research across 7 areas: scheduling primitives (node-cron v4 wins: 3M/week, 180KB, zero deps), daemon patterns (sidecar detached-spawn is the only viable cross-platform pattern for npm global CLIs — VS Code/GitHub CLI/Vercel CLI all use in-process or on-invocation, not system daemons), storage monitoring (check-disk-space: 3.2M/week, zero deps, Linux/macOS/Windows), crash recovery (gc-state.json with pendingPrune array gives systemd Persistent=true semantics in pure Node.js), escalation (daemon flags → next CLI invocation prompts, auto-prunes in non-TTY), comparison matrix (node-cron+sidecar scores 11/12), memory-architecture-spec update requirements (new §GC and Storage Lifecycle, gc-state.json added to .gitignore/init/backup). Recommendation: node-cron v4 in detached sidecar daemon + check-disk-space + gc-state.json. OS-native schedulers (systemd/launchd/schtasks) available as opt-in via cleo daemon install only — never postinstall.
recommendation: node-cron v4 in detached sidecar daemon (cleo daemon start/stop/status) + check-disk-space + gc-state.json persistence. OS-native via cleo daemon install (opt-in only).

title: Cross-Platform Local LLM for CLEO Transcript Extraction — April 2026 Landscape

Runners evaluated: Ollama (daemon, best UX, all OS), node-llama-cpp v3.18.1 (embeddable npm, all OS, pre-built binaries), transformers.js v4 (ONNX, already in CLEO, zero extra deps). Models evaluated: Gemma 4 E2B/E4B (Apache 2.0, best quality at size class, 128K context, native function calling), Phi-4 mini (MIT, 3.8B, strong reasoning), Qwen3 family (Apache 2.0, 0.6B-8B). SDKs evaluated: Vercel AI SDK v6 (recommended — provider-neutral, generateObject+Zod, Ollama provider), OpenAI Agents SDK (overkill for extraction), LangChain.js (overkill). Decision: Ollama+Gemma4-E2B as primary local path (shell-out, not bundled — model too large at 3.2GB), transformers.js+Qwen3-0.6B-ONNX as fallback (already installed), Claude Haiku as cold-tier. Q4 decision resolved: hybrid Option C confirmed. New config keys defined. New file: packages/core/src/memory/llm-backend-resolver.ts. memory-architecture-spec.md §7.1 update provided inline.
recommendation: Vercel AI SDK + @ai-sdk/ollama + gemma4:e2b (Ollama) primary; transformers.js + Qwen3-0.6B-ONNX fallback; Claude Haiku cold-tier. NO model bundled in npm. Shell-out only for generation.
